home.hero_subtitle: Comprehensive petroleum services delivering innovative solutions across Egypt, Libya & UAE. API & ISO certified with exclusive international agency partnerships.
home.services_subtitle: Comprehensive petroleum solutions tailored to your operational needs
home.service_1_text: Precision downhole tools and equipment via exclusive DDIC partnership — over 60 years of manufacturing expertise.
home.service_2_text: Logging, perforating, production logging, slickline, cased hole, and electric line services.
home.service_3_text: Tubular, NDT, lifting equipment inspection, dropped object surveying, and training services.
home.service_4_text: Complete BOP suite: annular, RAM, rotating, control units, kill & choke manifolds.
home.service_5_text: API-certified fabrication, threading, manufacturing, repair services, and equipment rental.
home.service_6_text: Full petroleum chemical portfolio via NAH exclusive distributorship across Egypt.
home.why_subtitle: Trusted by leading energy companies across the region
home.pillar_1_text: Stringent HSE protocols and a zero-incident operational culture across all projects.
home.pillar_2_text: Tailored services designed to meet specific client operational requirements.
home.pillar_3_text: End-to-end petroleum services delivered under one roof — from drilling to completion.
home.pillar_4_text: API Q1, ISO 9001:2015, and multiple API Monogram licenses ensuring top standards.

about.title: About Us
about.story_p1: At Lee Group For Petroleum Services, we are a reputable and leading provider of innovative petroleum services, committed to delivering exceptional solutions to the global energy industry. With an unwavering focus on technology, safety, and sustainability, we strive to set new standards and exceed customer expectations.
about.story_p2: Our team of highly skilled professionals possesses unparalleled expertise in various areas of the petroleum sector. We offer an extensive range of services, including Wireline, Well Control, and Inspection Services.
about.story_p3: As a company, we firmly believe in the power of innovation. We continuously invest in research and development to stay at the forefront of technological advancements, allowing us to provide our clients with cutting-edge solutions that enhance operational efficiency, maximize production, and reduce environmental impact.
about.story_p4: Founded in November 2022 and headquartered in New Cairo, Egypt, Lee Group has rapidly established itself as a trusted partner across Egypt, Libya, and the UAE, securing exclusive agency agreements with globally recognized manufacturers across the United States, UAE, China, Spain, India, and Egypt.
about.vision_text: To be a globally recognized leader in petroleum services, delivering innovative solutions and setting industry standards through excellence in technology, safety, and sustainability.
about.mission_text: To provide comprehensive and reliable petroleum services, utilizing cutting-edge technologies, while maintaining a steadfast commitment to safety, environmental stewardship, and customer satisfaction.
about.value_excellence_text: We strive for excellence in all aspects of our work, delivering superior services and exceeding customer expectations.
about.value_safety_text: We prioritize the safety of our employees, customers, and communities, adhering to strict safety protocols and promoting a culture of incident-free operations.
about.value_integrity_text: We conduct business with honesty, transparency, and ethical practices, building trust and maintaining long-term relationships with our stakeholders.
about.value_collaboration_text: We foster collaboration and teamwork, engaging with our employees, partners, and clients to achieve shared success.
about.geo_subtitle: Operating across three countries in the MENA region
about.geo_egypt_desc: Headquarters — New Cairo. Primary operations across the country.
about.geo_libya_desc: Active operations territory with growing presence.
